title: crassula interrupta var. glabrifolia
intro: Crassula interrupta var. glabrifolia, also known as the smooth jade plant, is a succulent species belonging to the family Crassulaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial effects. The smooth jade plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, wounds, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits in promoting wound healing and reducing inflammation. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the smooth jade plant can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed for potential therapeutic benefits.
